heading: Substitute check warranties
label: 5004 Substitute check warranties
notes: Effective DateSection effective at the end of the 12-month period beginning on , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 28, 2003section 20 of Pub. L. 108–100section 5001 of this title

children.text: the substitute check meets all the requirements for legal equivalence under ; andsection 5003(b) of this title

no depositary bank, drawee, drawer, or endorser will receive presentment or return of the substitute check, the original check, or a copy or other paper or electronic version of the substitute check or original check such that the bank, drawee, drawer, or endorser will be asked to make a payment based on a check that the bank, drawee, drawer, or endorser has already paid.
